inputs.label: Starting Customers
inputs.businessContext: Number of customers at the beginning of the measurement period.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of customers at the beginning of the measurement period.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Kunden zu Beginn des Messzeitraums.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de clients au début de la période de mesure.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de clientes al inicio del período de medición.

inputs.label: Ending Customers
inputs.businessContext: Number of customers at the end of the measurement period.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of customers at the end of the measurement period.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Kunden am Ende des Messzeitraums.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de clients à la fin de la période de mesure.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de clientes al final del período de medición.

inputs.label: New Customers
inputs.businessContext: Number of new customers acquired during the measurement period.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of new customers acquired during the measurement period.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ölçüm dönemi boyunca kazanılan yeni müşteri sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der während des Messzeitraums gewonnenen Neukunden.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de nouveaux clients acquis pendant la période de mesure.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de clientes nuevos adquiridos durante el período de medición.

inputs.label: Period Length
inputs.businessContext: Length of the measurement period in days (optional, can be used for annualization).

businessContext_i18n.en: Length of the measurement period in days (optional, can be used for annualization).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ölçüm döneminin gün cinsinden uzunluğu (isteğe bağlı, yıllıklandırma için kullanılabilir).
businessContext_i18n.de: Länge des Messzeitraums in Tagen (optional, für Annualisierung).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Durée de la période de mesure en jours (optionnel, peut être utilisé pour l'annualisation).
businessContext_i18n.es: Duración del período de medición en días (opcional, puede usarse para anualización).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
